label: water
groundingNote: something of one kind; there is very much of it in some places; it can move; when it moves, people can hear it; when the body touches it, someone feels it; if for a long time some of it is not inside someone's body, this someone cannot live
notes: NSM universal molecule (Goddard 2010 list). Note is a recognition anchor, not a full explication: the drinking clause is carried via 'inside someone's body'.
